user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Adatum Corporation. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 09:09 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation partner engagement

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 12:07 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Adatum Corporation

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 16:00 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-13
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Michelle (Adatum Corporation)

[00:02:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on partner engagement from our last session.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:11:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:16:00] Michelle (Adatum Corporation): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:19:00] Michelle (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:23:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:28:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:31:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:34:00] Michelle (Adatum Corporation): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:39:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:41:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: meeting is for account CSA should have declined

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Calendar Pre-Pack Automation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
